prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `aaecdb9a`.
codex_response:
Implemented `aaecdb9a` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: count the number of 8-connected monochrome components for colors `[5, 2, 8, 9, 6]`, then draw bottom-aligned bars of those heights on a `7` background in that fixed column order. I discarded the `sonnet45` hint because it described edge sampling, which contradicts the official examples; `opus46` matched and was used only as an initial hypothesis. No new reusable primitive was needed.

Validation passed end to end: `python -m arc2.shared.verify --task aaecdb9a` gave `4/4` official examples, the shared build produced `1000` examples plus previews, `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task aaecdb9a` gave `1000/1000`, and I visually spot-checked the final preview sheet. The generator matches the task family by explicitly sampling per-color component counts, then placing varied small-to-medium 8-connected motifs on a `10x10` `7` background with spacing similar to the originals.

Task package: [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_aaecdb9a/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_aaecdb9a/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_aaecdb9a/generator.py), [helpers.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_aaecdb9a/helpers.py), [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_aaecdb9a/notes.md)

Generated outputs: [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/aaecdb9a/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/aaecdb9a/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/aaecdb9a/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/aaecdb9a/previews/preview_02.png), [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/aaecdb9a/previews/preview_03.png)
